raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Recent executive orders extended paid sick leave to two weeks for farmworkers in California.",
    "A Disaster Relief Fund has been established to assist immigrant workers in California.",
    "COVID-19 cases among agricultural workers in Monterey County are disproportionately high, with 41 cases identified as working in the agricultural industry.",
    "Farmworkers' inability to socially distance and access healthcare makes them particularly vulnerable to COVID-19.",
    "Monterey County health officials reported that agricultural workers comprise about 25% of the local COVID-19 cases.",
    "Agricultural workers often work in close proximity for long periods of time, increasing their risk of COVID-19 transmission.",
    "Many farmworkers live and travel in crowded conditions, hindering their ability to socially distance or isolate.",
    "Farmworkers are classified as essential workers and contribute significantly to California’s agricultural industry, valued at $50 billion per year.",
    "Recent legislation introduced in California focuses on providing COVID-19 relief specifically for farmworkers."
  ]
}
```
